title: OUNONA 6Pcs Ceramic Fish Tea Cup Set Ice Cracked Design Teaware for Home Office Party Entertaining with Heat Insulation Assorted Patterns
features: Unique Ice Cracked Fish Design: This 6PCS Ceramic Fish Tea Cup Set features a distinctive ice cracked glaze with assorted fish patterns, adding an elegant and artistic touch to your teaware collection and enhancing your tea drinking experience

Premium Ceramic Material with Heat Insulation: Crafted from quality ceramic, these tea cups provide effective heat insulation ensuring safe and comfortable use during tea time whether at home or office

Compact and Practical Size: Measuring approximately 2.6 x 2.6 x 1.4 inches, this tea cup set is space-saving and ideal for personal use, suitable for enjoying leisure tea moments without occupying much room
Versatile for Various Occasions: Perfect for entertaining friends and family at personal parties or housewarming events, this ceramic fish tea set adds an aesthetic appeal and enriches gatherings
Easy to Clean and Maintain: the smooth ceramic surface allows effortless rinsing and cleaning, making it convenient for daily use while preserving the elegant appearance over time
